subject: Sociology
title: The Digital Divide
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on The Digital Divide.

hook.text: The internet is for everyone. Except the billions without reliable access, skills, or affordable devices.

buildup.text: The digital divide is the gap between those with meaningful internet access and those without, split by class and place.

discovery.text: It's not just access. Digital literacy — the ability to use technology effectively — divides users by education and age.

twist.text: As services move online, the divide deepens inequality: jobs, education, healthcare, and government all need internet.

climax.text: The digital divide mirrors and deepens existing social inequalities. Technology without access is just another barrier.

quiz.question: What is the digital divide?
options: The gap between those with and without meaningful internet access
